mapper.select: SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(COL.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, UPPER(COL.COLUMN_NAME) FIELDNAME, COL.UDT_NAME FIELDTYPE, CASE COL.IS_NULLABLE WHEN 'YES' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END ALLOWNULL, CASE COL.UDT_NAME WHEN 'varchar' THEN COL.CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH ELSE NULL END FIELDLENGTH, REPLACE(COALESCE(COL.COLUMN_DEFAULT, ''), '''', '') DEFAULTVALUE, COL.NUMERIC_PRECISION "PRECISION", COL.NUMERIC_SCALE "SCALE", COALESCE(DES.DESCRIPTION, '') FIELDCOMMENT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS COL LEFT JOIN PG_DESCRIPTION DES ON COL.TABLE_NAME ::REGCLASS = DES.OBJOID AND COL.ORDINAL_POSITION = DES.OBJSUBID WHERE COL.TABLE_SCHEMA = CURRENT_SCHEMA() ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION) T

SELECT UPPER(COL.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, UPPER(COL.COLUMN_NAME) FIELDNAME, COL.UDT_NAME FIELDTYPE, CASE COL.IS_NULLABLE WHEN 'YES' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END ALLOWNULL, CASE COL.UDT_NAME WHEN 'varchar' THEN COL.CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH ELSE NULL END FIELDLENGTH, REPLACE(COALESCE(COL.COLUMN_DEFAULT, ''), '''', '') DEFAULTVALUE, COL.NUMERIC_PRECISION "PRECISION", COL.NUMERIC_SCALE "SCALE", COALESCE(DES.DESCRIPTION, '') FIELDCOMMENT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS COL LEFT JOIN PG_DESCRIPTION DES ON COL.TABLE_NAME ::REGCLASS = DES.OBJOID AND COL.ORDINAL_POSITION = DES.OBJSUBID WHERE COL.TABLE_SCHEMA = CURRENT_SCHEMA() AND UPPER(COL.TABLE_NAME) = #{tableName} ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(T.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, UPPER(I.RELNAME) INDEXNAME, STRING_AGG(UPPER(A.ATTNAME), ',') INDEXFIELD, CASE WHEN IX.INDISPRIMARY THEN '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@primarykey}' WHEN IX.INDISUNIQUE THEN '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@unique}' ELSE '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@regular}' END INDEXTYPE FROM (SELECT PC.RELNAME TABLE_NAME, PC.* FROM PG_CLASS PC) T, PG_CLASS I, PG_INDEX IX, PG_ATTRIBUTE A WHERE T.OID = IX.INDRELID AND I.OID = IX.INDEXRELID AND A.ATTRELID = T.OID AND A.ATTNUM = ANY(IX.INDKEY) AND T.RELKIND = 'r' GROUP BY T.TABLE_NAME, I.RELNAME, IX.INDISUNIQUE, IX.INDISPRIMARY ORDER BY INDEXTYPE) T

SELECT UPPER(T.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, UPPER(I.RELNAME) INDEXNAME, STRING_AGG(UPPER(A.ATTNAME), ',') INDEXFIELD, CASE WHEN IX.INDISPRIMARY THEN '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@primarykey}' WHEN IX.INDISUNIQUE THEN '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@unique}' ELSE '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@regular}' END INDEXTYPE FROM (SELECT PC.RELNAME TABLE_NAME, PC.* FROM PG_CLASS PC) T, PG_CLASS I, PG_INDEX IX, PG_ATTRIBUTE A WHERE T.OID = IX.INDRELID AND I.OID = IX.INDEXRELID AND A.ATTRELID = T.OID AND A.ATTNUM = ANY(IX.INDKEY) AND T.RELKIND = 'r' AND UPPER(T.TABLE_NAME) = #{tableName} GROUP BY T.TABLE_NAME, I.RELNAME, IX.INDISUNIQUE, IX.INDISPRIMARY ORDER BY INDEXTYPE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = CURRENT_SCHEMA() AND TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' AND UPPER(TABLE_NAME) = #{tableName}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = CURRENT_SCHEMA() AND TABLE_TYPE = 'VIEW' AND UPPER(TABLE_NAME) = #{viewName}

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(TAB.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, DES.DESCRIPTION TABLEDESC FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES TAB LEFT JOIN PG_DESCRIPTION DES ON TAB.TABLE_NAME ::REGCLASS = DES.OBJOID AND DES.OBJSUBID = 0 WHERE TAB.TABLE_SCHEMA = CURRENT_SCHEMA() AND TAB.TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE') T

SELECT UPPER(TAB.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, DES.DESCRIPTION TABLEDESC FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES TAB LEFT JOIN PG_DESCRIPTION DES ON TAB.TABLE_NAME ::REGCLASS = DES.OBJOID AND DES.OBJSUBID = 0 WHERE TAB.TABLE_SCHEMA = CURRENT_SCHEMA() AND TAB.TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' AND UPPER(TAB.TABLE_NAME) = #{tableName}

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(TAB.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES TAB WHERE TAB.TABLE_SCHEMA = CURRENT_SCHEMA() AND TAB.TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE') T
ORDER BY T.TABLENAME

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(V.TABLE_NAME) VIEWNAME, UPPER(V.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, V.VIEW_DEFINITION SELECTSTATEMENT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.VIEWS V WHERE V.TABLE_SCHEMA = CURRENT_SCHEMA() ORDER BY V.TABLE_NAME) T

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(TAB.TABLE_NAME) TABLEORVIEWNAME, 'table' DBSTRUCTURETYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES TAB WHERE TAB.TABLE_SCHEMA = CURRENT_SCHEMA() AND TAB.TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' UNION SELECT UPPER(V.TABLE_NAME) TABLEORVIEWNAME, 'view' DBSTRUCTURETYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.VIEWS V WHERE V.TABLE_SCHEMA = CURRENT_SCHEMA() ORDER BY TABLEORVIEWNAME) T
